sentiment.reasoning: The launch of a new product platform is a positive operational development that should drive revenue growth over time.

sentiment.reasoning: Completing a planned facility upgrade is an operational milestone that is expected and likely already priced in.

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% margin improvement directly signals increased profitability and operational efficiency, which is highly positive.

headlines.headline: Relvos Biosciences reports record quarterly revenue, up 25% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: A 20% drop in new customer orders is a significant negative signal regarding demand and future revenue growth.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
